[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110110111 8
1 0000111101 5
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0111000110 5
5 0011100010 4
6 1010100100 4
7 0001100001 3

12 21 0010100000 2
23 32 0000100000 1
34 43 0001100001 3 match 7
45 54 0001011100 4
56 65 0000010100 2
67 76 0000110101 4
70 07 0000000100 1

13 31 0001100000 2
24 42 0010100100 3
35 53 0001000000 1
46 64 0010110111 6

71 17 0000100000 1

25 52 0000000100 1

47 74 0000111101 5 match 1

61 16 0010100010 3
